name: preset-particulate-cloud
description: Penumbra ADR 0011 — load 'particulate-cloud' preset. SDF Teapot rendered as a wispy 3D point cloud anchored to the surface via atlas seeding + fbm displacement + Newton-step pull. Verifies that all particulate axes (cloudNoise=0.8, seedSubdivision=4, softness=0.7, pullMode=sdf) propagate from the JSON catalog through the renderer.

setup.vlmDescription: A soft, wispy cloud of light particles arranged around the silhouette of an SDF teapot, anchored to the surface but with organic density variation. Not a hard surface, not a uniform fog — particulate haze with visible 3D parallax depth.
